name: HubSpot
description: All-in-one CRM with marketing, sales and service hubs. Generous free tier that scales into a full growth platform.
bestFor: growing teams that want marketing, sales and support in one place
highlights: Marketing, sales & service in one suite

name: Pipedrive
description: A sales-first CRM built around a visual pipeline. Simple to set up and focused on helping reps close deals.
bestFor: small sales teams that want a no-fuss visual pipeline

name: Zoho CRM
description: A budget-friendly CRM that's part of the broader Zoho suite. Lots of features for the price across sales and marketing.
bestFor: cost-conscious teams already using other Zoho apps
highlights: Part of the wider Zoho ecosystem
Strong value at lower price points

name: Salesforce
description: The enterprise CRM standard. Endlessly customizable and powerful, with a learning curve and price tag to match.
bestFor: larger teams that need deep customization and scale

name: ClickUp
description: A highly flexible work platform: tasks, docs, goals and dashboards in one. Aims to replace several separate tools.
bestFor: teams that want one flexible app for tasks, docs and goals

name: Asana
description: A polished project and task manager loved for its clean UX. Strong for coordinating work across teams.
bestFor: teams that value a clean, easy-to-adopt interface

name: Monday.com
description: A colorful, spreadsheet-style Work OS you can shape into project management, CRM, or operations boards.
bestFor: teams that want a visual, build-your-own workspace
highlights: Lots of templates to start fast

name: Trello
description: Simple Kanban boards anyone can pick up in minutes. Great for lightweight projects and personal organization.
bestFor: individuals and small teams who want simple Kanban boards

name: Mailchimp
description: The best-known email marketing platform, now with broader marketing features. Friendly for beginners.
bestFor: small businesses sending their first newsletters and campaigns

name: Brevo
description: Formerly Sendinblue. Email plus SMS and automation, priced by emails sent rather than contacts — friendly to big lists.
bestFor: teams with large contact lists who want email + SMS
highlights: Free plan with daily send limit

name: ActiveCampaign
description: Email marketing with serious automation and light CRM. A favorite when you outgrow basic newsletter tools.
bestFor: businesses that need advanced automation and segmentation

name: Kit
description: Formerly ConvertKit. Email built for creators — newsletters, landing pages and simple automations with a clean focus.
bestFor: creators, writers and solo businesses building an audience

name: QuickBooks
description: The most widely used small-business accounting software. Invoicing, expenses, payroll add-ons and accountant support.
bestFor: US small businesses that want the most-supported accounting tool

name: Xero
description: Cloud accounting with unlimited users on every plan and a clean interface. Strong outside the US, growing inside it.
bestFor: teams that want unlimited users without per-seat fees

name: FreshBooks
description: Accounting built around invoicing and time tracking, aimed at freelancers and service businesses.
bestFor: freelancers and service businesses focused on invoicing

name: Wave
description: Free accounting and invoicing for very small businesses. You pay only for payments and payroll add-ons.
bestFor: solo and very small businesses on a tight budget

name: Slack
description: The messaging app that defined team chat. Channels, huge integration library and a polished experience.
bestFor: teams that want best-in-class chat and integrations

name: Microsoft Teams
description: Chat, meetings and calls bundled with Microsoft 365. Hard to beat if your business already lives in Office.
bestFor: businesses already paying for Microsoft 365

name: Zoom
description: The video meeting default for many. Reliable calls, webinars and a growing set of team chat features.
bestFor: teams whose main need is reliable video meetings

name: Google Workspace
description: Gmail, Meet, Chat, Docs and Drive under one business plan. Communication plus a full productivity suite.
bestFor: businesses that want email, docs and meetings in one suite

name: Shopify
description: The go-to platform for building an online store. Everything to sell online, with a big theme and app ecosystem.
bestFor: anyone building a serious online store

name: Wix
description: Drag-and-drop website builder with templates for almost anything. Easy for beginners to launch a site fast.
bestFor: beginners who want a flexible drag-and-drop builder
highlights: Free plan to try it out

name: Squarespace
description: Beautifully designed templates for portfolios, brands and small stores. Strong on aesthetics out of the box.
bestFor: creatives and brands that want a polished look fast

name: Webflow
description: Visual web design with the power of real code and a CMS. Popular with designers who want pixel control.
bestFor: designers who want pixel-level control plus a CMS
